title: Sony's FX5 cinema camera finally offers open gate and RAW 5K recording - Engadget
summary: The FX5 slots between the FX3 and FX6 in the company's "Cinema Line" and comes with features previously missing on Sony cameras like RAW video and open gate recording. With a new de-squeeze function, it also allows easier use of anamorphic lenses.
caption: output/2026-07-23/sony-s-fx5-cinema-camera-finally-offers-open-gate-and-raw-5k-recording.txt
